title: pilea pulegifolia
intro: Pilea pulegifolia, also known as Peihu's Pilea, is a flowering plant species native to China and Taiwan, characterized by its small white flowers and variegated leaves. Pilea pulegifolia is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Pilea pulegifolia are typically made into a tea or a decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
